title: Notion Template Sales Page Copy Swipe File for Creators
description: Notion template creators selling on Gumroad or their own site get a swipe file of 12 high-converting product page structures with annotated headlines, benefit bullets, and FAQ sections pulled from top-selling templates.
gumroad_description:
Stop guessing what your sales page needs and start copying what actually converts.

This swipe file gives you 14 battle-tested product page structures from Notion templates that consistently hit five-figure launches. No fluff. No theory. Just annotated headlines, benefit bullets, and FAQ sections you can adapt in minutes.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Notion template creators launching on Gumroad or your own site who've stared at a blank page wondering what to write
— Sellers tired of generic copy frameworks that don't account for template-specific pain points and objections
— Anyone who learns faster by reverse-engineering winners than by reading copywriting blogs

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 14 copy-ready examples from best-selling templates across different niches
— Annotated breakdowns explaining why each section works (not just what to copy)
— Both Markdown and JSON formats so you can paste directly into your tools
— Usage notes showing which structures fit different template types

Your sales page is the only salesperson working 24/7. Make it count.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
